key_items: Bitcoin ETF flows reverse as US funds shed $1B amid inflation fears - most severe weekly capital flight since end of January
US Treasury yields surge to new highs as liquidity tightens, pushing Bitcoin back below $82,000 resistance
BlackRock Just Sold $317 Million Worth of Bitcoin - institutional investors pulling hundreds of millions during market reversal
reasoning: Macro headwinds are dominating Bitcoin price action with rising US Treasury yields tightening liquidity and triggering significant institutional outflows from spot Bitcoin ETFs. The technical breakdown below $78K combined with $1B+ weekly ETF redemptions signals weakening demand, though some analysts view current levels as a 'bear trap' offering potential for mean reversion.
risks: Continued surge in bond yields and further liquidity contraction could accelerate a deeper Bitcoin correction toward $75K support, especially if macroeconomic data deteriorates further.
